_comment: Project-level Claude Code settings for Interior Vision. Commit this file. Do NOT commit user-level overrides (place those in ~/.claude/settings.json).

permissions._comment: Auto-approved commands run without prompting. Keep this list minimal and READ-ONLY where possible.

hooks.command: bash -c 'f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.md|*.yml|*.yaml) pnpm exec prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.py) (cd apps/api 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null) || true ;; *.rs) rustfmt "$f" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac'
bash -c 'cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git push.*origin.*main|git push.*--force|--no-verify"; then echo "BLOCKED: forbidden git operation" >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0'

mcpServers._comment: Context7 fetches version-specific docs on demand. Trigger with 'use context7' in prompts, or by referencing a library by name. GitHub server requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in your shell env.
